records.statement: Agent delegation: orchestrator reads SKILL.md procedure doc then delegates to specialist agents via Agent tool

Approval gate source of truth: `harness/policies/approvals.yaml` is the enforcement gate the orchestrator checks before touching sensitive areas. `harness/manifest.yaml` `risk_zones` is descriptive context only
Hidden workflow SKILL.md files are internal procedure documents: SKILL.md contains step-by-step instructions read by the orchestrator, not executable code and not user-invocable commands
Template-based setup: `skills/setup/templates/` contains all scaffolding templates with `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` syntax
User-invocable command surface is limited to two public commands: `/harness:setup` (bootstrap) and `/harness:validate` (diagnostic). All other workflows are hidden internal procedures
`.claude-plugin/` — marketplace metadata
`harness/` — repo-local operating state (generated per-project by setup)
`plugin/` — all plugin runtime code (skills, agents, hooks, scripts)
Committed to git — all team members share the same retrieval advantage
Generated by `harness/scripts/build-memory-index.py` (no LLM involvement)
`harness/memory-index/` — deterministic JSON compilation of all durable sources
**Never manually edited** — always regenerated from source
Scope indexing is active: `by-domain/` and `by-path/` are populated on each rebuild
Temporal relations are populated from ADR supersession chains in `relations` fields
`active/by-domain/` — records grouped by scope domain
`active/by-identifier/` — records referencing specific ADRs/REQs
`active/by-path/` — records grouped by scope path (normalized keys)
`active/by-source-path/` — records grouped by provenance.source_path
`active/by-subject/` — all active records grouped by subject_key
`timeline/` — records grouped by canonical_subject_key with latest-active tracking
Built by `harness/scripts/build-memory-overlay.sh` from current session state
Cleaned up when changes are committed; gitignored — per-session only
`.harness-cache/memory-overlay/` — uncommitted working memory
Merged at query time via `--include-overlay` flag, overrides compiled index for same subject
confirmed: verified by user or explicit repo rule
enforced: encoded as test, lint rule, config assertion, or validation script
hypothesis: inferred, not yet verified
observed_fact: verified by code/tests/logs
`plugin.json` does not support `"agents"` or `"hooks"` fields — validation error. Evidence: install failed with "agents: Invalid input".
Plugin skills are resolved relative to plugin root directory. Evidence: `"skills": "./skills/"` in plugin.json works when plugin root is set correctly.

Relative plugin source (`./plugin`) is supported for Git-based marketplaces. Path resolves from the marketplace root. URL-based marketplace catalogs should use external plugin sources instead of relative paths. Evidence: Git-based marketplace add works with relative source.

`plugin.json` does not support `"agents"` or `"hooks"` fields. Resolved: 2026-03-20. Outcome: agents are auto-discovered from `agents/` directory without plugin.json declaration. Adding `"agents"` causes validation error.

`plugin/settings.json` `"agent"` field sets the shipped plugin default main agent. Resolved: 2026-03-22. Outcome: `plugin/settings.json` sets the plugin's default main-thread agent for all users. Project `.claude/settings.json` can override this for local development (e.g., activating `harness:harness-orchestrator` explicitly). These are different configuration levels, not competing settings.
`harness/docs/*` — constraints, decisions, requirements, architecture, runbooks
`harness/policies/*` — approvals, memory policy
`harness/state/*` — recent decisions, unknowns
ADR supersession chains are tracked via `relations.supersedes`
`canonical_subject_key` enables timeline grouping but coverage is incremental
Freeform docs do not yet generate cross-references
Operator tokens (before, after, latest) are separated from lexical scoring to prevent false matches
Resolved unknowns link to decisions via `relations.resolves`
